_comment: Manual overrides and ignore list for CrowdStrike Flight Control children whose name does not exact-match an active Client Portal Location_Name.

_unmapped_pending_review._comment: Children with no clear CP match. Decision pending. Leaving unmapped is safe - they just don't get a per-client folder.
_unmapped_pending_review.19c0ddd520544cd1ac264339b5afdb98: Vintage Design (already-mapped 'Vintage Group' would clash if this also resolves to VG)

hostname_prefix._comment: Single-CID fallback only. Ignored when Flight Control multi-tenant mode is active (which is the case for Technijian's tenant).
